## Checks

- [ ] `git status` reviewed before staging.
- [ ] Only explicit files were staged; `git add .` was not used.
- [ ] `git diff --cached` reviewed before commit.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, SSH keys, `.env` files, or remote credentials were committed.
- [ ] No VASP runtime outputs, logs, or large local reference bundles were committed.
- [ ] Any reference bundle, third-party material, binary, PDF, or image exception is listed above with user confirmation.
- [ ] The PR description matches the actual changed files and diff size.
- [ ] Local mirror changes are not described as server-side changes.
- [ ] No `ssh lilin`, `sbatch`, or remote write operation was performed without user approval.
